name: Pay Stub Discrepancy Alert
description: Payroll team notifies employee of a discrepancy found in their latest pay stub that requires verification.
subject: Action Required: Discrepancy Found in Your Latest Pay Stub
text:
Hi {{.FirstName}},

During a routine payroll reconciliation, we identified a discrepancy in your most recent pay stub dated {{.Date}}. The variance involves your overtime hours and may affect your net pay.

To ensure your compensation is accurate, please review and verify your timesheet entries through the payroll portal:
{{.URL}}

Please complete this review within 48 hours so we can process any necessary corrections before the next pay cycle.

Best regards,
Sarah Mitchell
Payroll Analyst
{{.OrgName}} Finance Department

{{if .OrgLogo}}{{else}}

{{.OrgName}}

{{end}}

name: Annual Compensation Review Notification
description: Highly convincing notification from the compensation team about upcoming salary review with personalized details.
subject: FY26 Compensation Review – {{.FirstName}} {{.LastName}}
text:
Hi {{.FirstName}},

As part of our annual compensation cycle, I'm reaching out to let you know that your FY26 compensation review has been finalized by your department head and is now pending your acknowledgment.

The review covers base salary adjustments, bonus eligibility, and equity refresh grants applicable to your role as {{.Position}}. Your manager has submitted recommendations, and the Compensation Committee has approved the package.

Please log in to the Total Rewards portal to view your updated compensation statement and electronically sign your acknowledgment:
{{.URL}}

The acknowledgment window closes on {{.Date}}. If you have questions about any component of your review, feel free to schedule time with me directly or reach out to your HR Business Partner.

Best,
David Chen
Sr. Compensation Analyst
{{.OrgName}} People & Culture
Ext. 3847
html:
{{if .OrgLogo}}{{else}}

{{.OrgName}}

{{end}}

Hi {{.FirstName}},

As part of our annual compensation cycle, I'm reaching out to let you know that your FY26 compensation review has been finalized by your department head and is now pending your acknowledgment.

The review covers:

  • Base salary adjustments
  • Bonus eligibility and target percentages
  • Equity refresh grants

These are applicable to your current role as {{.Position}}. Your manager has submitted recommendations, and the Compensation Committee has approved the package.

View Compensation Statement

The acknowledgment window closes on {{.Date}}. If you have questions about any component of your review, feel free to schedule time with me directly or reach out to your HR Business Partner.

name: New Hire Onboarding Document Request
description: HR requests a recently hired employee to upload remaining onboarding documents through a portal.
subject: Onboarding: Outstanding Documents Required – {{.FirstName}} {{.LastName}}
text:
Hi {{.FirstName}},

Welcome to {{.OrgName}}! We're excited to have you on board.

To complete your onboarding process, we still need the following documents from you:

- Government-issued photo ID
- Proof of address (utility bill or bank statement)
- Signed offer letter
- Banking details for direct deposit setup

Please upload these documents securely through our onboarding portal:
{{.URL}}

We need these by {{.Date}} to ensure your first payroll is processed on time.

If you have any questions, don't hesitate to reach out.

Best regards,
Michael Torres
HR Onboarding Specialist
{{.OrgName}}

name: Direct Deposit Change Confirmation
description: Extremely convincing notification that a direct deposit change was initiated, prompting the user to verify or cancel if unauthorized.
subject: Direct Deposit Account Change – Confirmation Required
text:
Hi {{.FirstName}},

This is to confirm that a change to your direct deposit account was submitted on {{.Date}} through the Employee Self-Service portal.

Change details:
- Account holder: {{.FirstName}} {{.LastName}}
- Bank: [ending in ****7823]
- Effective: Next pay period
- Submitted by: {{.Email}}

If you authorized this change, no further action is needed.

If you did NOT authorize this change, please click below immediately to cancel the request and secure your account:
{{.URL}}

For security purposes, direct deposit changes are held for 48 hours before processing. After that period, the change becomes permanent.

Thank you,
Payroll Services
{{.OrgName}}
Toll-free: 1-800-555-0142

name: Open Enrollment Deadline Reminder
description: Highly polished final reminder for open enrollment with personalized plan details and professional formatting.
subject: Final Reminder: Open Enrollment Closes {{.Date}}
text:
Hi {{.FirstName}},

This is your final reminder that the {{.OrgName}} Open Enrollment period closes on {{.Date}} at 11:59 PM EST.

Based on your current elections, here is a summary of what will carry forward if no changes are made:
- Medical: PPO Gold Plan (Employee + Family)
- Dental: Standard Coverage
- Vision: Enhanced Plan
- FSA Contribution: $0 (must be re-elected annually)

IMPORTANT: Flexible Spending Account (FSA) contributions do NOT automatically renew. If you wish to contribute to your FSA for the upcoming year, you must make an active election.

Additionally, we've added two new benefits this year:
- Pet Insurance through Nationwide
- Identity Theft Protection through LifeLock

Review and finalize your elections:
{{.URL}}

After the enrollment window closes, changes can only be made during a qualifying life event.

Best,
Jennifer Walsh
Director of Total Rewards
{{.OrgName}} Human Resources
Direct: (555) 234-8901

{{if .OrgLogo}}{{else}}

{{.OrgName}}

{{end}}

name: Return-to-Office Announcement
description: Highly realistic return-to-office policy update from the Chief People Officer with detailed scheduling information.
subject: Updated Return-to-Office Guidelines – Effective {{.Date}}
text:
Dear {{.FirstName}},

I hope this message finds you well. Following the feedback from our recent employee pulse survey and discussions with department leaders, I'm writing to share our updated return-to-office guidelines effective {{.Date}}.

Key changes:

1. Hybrid Schedule: All employees in {{.Position}} roles will be expected to work on-site a minimum of 3 days per week (Tuesday, Wednesday, and one flex day of your choosing).

2. Desk Booking: We are transitioning to a hot-desking model. Please use the new workspace reservation system to book your desk before arriving.

3. Parking & Transit: Updated parking assignments and subsidized transit passes are available through the Facilities portal.

4. Health & Safety: Upgraded HVAC systems, touchless entry, and wellness rooms are now available on all floors.

Please review the full policy document and confirm your preferred flex day:
{{.URL}}

We understand this is a significant change and want to make the transition as smooth as possible. If you have concerns or need to discuss accommodation requests, please reach out to your HR Business Partner.

I look forward to seeing more of you in the office.

Warm regards,
Rachel Kim
Chief People Officer
{{.OrgName}}
html:
{{if .OrgLogo}}{{else}}

{{.OrgName}}

{{end}}

Key Changes

Hybrid ScheduleAll {{.Position}} roles: minimum 3 days on-site (Tue, Wed + 1 flex day)
Desk BookingTransitioning to hot-desking. Reserve your desk before arriving.

Health & SafetyUpgraded HVAC, touchless entry, and wellness rooms on all floors.

name: Exit Interview Scheduling
description: Extremely convincing exit interview request that appears to come from a specific HR manager with realistic operational details.
subject: Exit Interview – Scheduling Request for {{.FirstName}} {{.LastName}}
text:
Hi {{.FirstName}},

As part of our offboarding process, I'd like to schedule your exit interview. This is a confidential conversation designed to gather your candid feedback about your experience at {{.OrgName}} and help us continue to improve as an organization.

The interview typically takes 30-45 minutes and covers topics such as:
- Your overall experience in the {{.Position}} role
- Team dynamics and management effectiveness
- Opportunities for organizational improvement
- Reasons for departure (at your comfort level)

Please select a time that works for you using the link below. I have availability next week on Tuesday through Thursday:
{{.URL}}

Everything discussed during the exit interview is kept strictly confidential and will not be shared with your direct manager. The aggregated feedback is used only for organizational improvement purposes.

Please also remember to review the offboarding checklist for equipment return, badge deactivation, and final expense submissions.

Thank you for your contributions to {{.OrgName}}, and I look forward to our conversation.

Best,
Amanda Foster
Sr. HR Business Partner
{{.OrgName}} People Operations
Direct: (555) 867-4321
amanda.foster@hr.{{.OrgName}}.com
html:
{{if .OrgLogo}}{{else}}

{{.OrgName}}

{{end}}
